---

## Overview

> Big data analytics engine for processing massive high-dimensional datasets.

**High Dimensional Data Clustering Framework on Cloud with Deep AI** is an advanced machine learning / ai system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. Built with FastAPI, PyTorch, TensorFlow.

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph TD;
    A["Raw Data Input"] -->|"Ingest"| B["Preprocessing Pipeline"];
    B -->|"Clean Tensors"| D{"TF + PyTorch Engine"};
    D -->|"Training Loop"| E["Inference & Prediction"];
    E -->|"Live Results"| W["FastAPI Dashboard"];
    E -->|"Metrics"| F["Evaluation & Output"];

    style A fill:#1a0011,stroke:#ff6e96,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#2d001e,stroke:#ff6e96,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style D fill:#1a0011,stroke:#ff6e96,stroke-width:3px,color:#fff
    style E fill:#2d001e,stroke:#ff6e96,stroke-width:1px,color:#fff
    style F fill:#45002f,stroke:#ff6e96,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
High-Dimensional-Data-Clustering-Framework-on-Cloud-with-Deep-AI/
  .env.example
  .gitignore
  DATABASE_FREE_README.md
  Dockerfile
  FREE_SETUP_GUIDE.md
  GUI_README.md
  LICENSE
  README.md
  configs/
    deep_embedding_config.yaml
  data/
    sample_data.csv
    sample_data_gui.csv
  notebooks/
    clustering_analysis.ipynb
  results/
    clustered_data_acb3a0ad.csv
    clustered_data_c91df9ae.csv
    clustered_data_cbefa4dc.csv
    clustered_data_e72627ad.csv
  scripts/
    deploy_azure.ps1
    deploy_azure.sh
    generate_sample_data.py
  src/
    config.py
    main.py
  tests/
    test_clustering.py
  web-dashboard/
    package.json
```

<br/>

## Technical Specifications

| Attribute | Detail |
|:---|:---|
| **Primary Language** | `Python` |
| **Project Category** | `Machine Learning / AI` |
| **Total Source Files** | `49` |
| **Frameworks** | `FastAPI`, `PyTorch`, `TensorFlow` |
| **IP Status** | `Strictly Proprietary` |

## Dependencies

<p align="left">
  <code>torch</code>  <code>scikit-learn</code>  <code>plotly</code>  <code>tensorflow</code>  <code>hdbscan</code>  <code>seaborn</code>  <code>pandas</code>  <code>spectral-clustering</code>  <code>pyclustering</code>  <code>azure-functions</code>  <code>matplotlib</code>  <code>keras</code>  <code>numpy</code>  <code>azure-storage-blob</code>  <code>azure-servicebus</code>
</p>
